TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_frog_Uva

S.FORM: ’e na pungana takarura.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙在水缸裡面。
The frog is in the urn.

S.FORM: uh tanahe en isi 'una vuan sua ihi ia ʉncoo sinang in sinang in misee.
S.TRANSL: 這是他的家，月亮是他的照明。我想應該是照明吧。
This is his home. There exists the moon which is his lighting. I think it must be the lighting.

S.FORM: eh muha cu cu muha cu nesi ia se’ecʉpʉ manu iha tatarʉ.
S.TRANSL: 在這裡，那個小孩在床舖睡覺。
Here the child slept in the bed.

S.FORM: se’ecʉpʉ ’e tikirimi ʉh aramia’ʉ cumu’ʉra ʉh takarura nimon nimusikarʉ na pungana.
S.TRANSL: 睡醒之後，（男孩）在尋找曾經掉到那個水缸裡面的青蛙。
After sleeping, (the boy) was seeking the frog which had dropped into the urn.

S.FORM: aramia’ʉ manu isa tikirim.
S.TRANSL: 那位小孩醒來後四處找。
That child woke up and looked around.

S.FORM: makahua cu uh aramia’ʉ manu iat sua tamtitu in ia ’esi na kukuce en.
S.TRANSL: 之後（那個）小孩醒來，他的小狗在他的後面。
Then the child woke up, and his dog was behind him.

S.FORM: ʉncaa nguain tamna kucu manu tamna kucu.
S.TRANSL: 那邊有他的鞋子，那個小孩的鞋子。
There are his shoes, the kid’s shoes.

S.FORM: eh makasua cu sua tamtitu iha nimusikarʉ na pungana ’an tavarʉ’ʉ arapapining.
S.TRANSL: 那之後，在甕裡面的那隻小狗無法出來。
After that, the dog inside the urn couldn’t get out of it.

S.FORM: eh manu isi cʉrʉʉn kee carapung in.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩，他看著他的帽子。
This kid, he looked at his hat.

S.FORM: ’an tara’ʉ makacarapung si nimusikarʉ na pungana.
S.TRANSL: 他不能戴帽子，因為（帽子）掉到水缸裡。
He couldn’t wear the hat because it had dropped into the urn.

S.FORM: makahua cu mosa manu iha na si’inʉva.
S.TRANSL: 在那之後，那個小孩到門口。
After that, that kid went to the door.

S.FORM: pokari ’akia kan nguain tamna takarura.
S.TRANSL: （男孩）大叫說他的青蛙不見了。
(The kid) shouted that his frog had disappeared.

S.FORM: ʉh tamtitu ia nimusikarʉ ’inia pungana ’an tarʉ’ʉ pokarikari.
S.TRANSL: 小狗掉入水缸那裡，不能叫。
The dog dropped into the urn and could not call out.

S.FORM: ʉh ’e cu metetarʉ tikirimi kee nguain ʉh takarura ’akia.
S.TRANSL: （男孩）已經一直等了，尋找他的不見的青蛙。
(The kid) kept waiting, and looked for his lost frog.

S.FORM: ’esi meranasʉ tamtitu i nimusikarʉ na pungana ’an tara arapapining.
S.TRANSL: 這隻小狗很苦惱，他進入到水缸裡面沒有辦法出來了。
This distressed dog worried that it could not go out from the urn it had entered.

S.FORM: ʉh mecocua cu nesi niarapapining cu tamtitu aio macangcangarʉ manu ia keriviin kee makasi.
S.TRANSL: 兩個已經一起在這裡，小狗已經出來了，小孩非常高興把小狗這樣抱起來。
Those two has been together. The dog has been out of the urn. The kid was very happy and held the dog.

S.FORM: sii a nimusikarʉ na ‘a satu’u a’ satu’u ’a nen cu maracocua mataa tamtitu mataa manu ihi.
S.TRANSL: 因為曾經掉到箱子，嗯，對，箱子裡面。怎樣了？小狗和小孩走在一起
Because (it) had dropped into the box... yeah, the box. How is it? The dog and the kid walked together.

S.FORM: ’i na karu ʉh na ramisi ’ʉnʉ’ʉnai maracocua mo nia pokari takarura ’e kasu nan takarura arapapininga.
S.TRANSL: 在樹上，呃，在樹根那裡的地面上，兩個一起在那裡呼叫，青蛙，你在哪裡，青蛙，出來啊！
The stay in the tree, uh... at the tree, calling “Frog~~ where are you, frog, come on out.”

S.FORM: ’a cʉ’ʉr e nia karu ihi ’una uh tarako.
S.TRANSL: 他看著這顆樹，啊，有個洞。
He looked at this tree. There is a hole.

S.FORM: ’una tarako a’ eio ’una ava nesi anu nimutatin na karu.
S.TRANSL: 有個洞，啊呀！原來有個蜂窩掛在樹這裡！
There is a hole. Oh! So there is a beehive suspended here in the tree!

S.FORM: mon inia tasa ihi.
S.TRANSL: 這兩個人待在那裡。
These two stayed there.

S.FORM: mara na anu ia nimatapari’i tamtitu na canum.
S.TRANSL: 拿那個蜂窩，小狗掉到池塘裡面。
Holding that beehive, the dog dropped into the pool.

S.FORM: nimatapari na tamtitu ia nimatapari na canum.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗掉到池塘裡面。
That dog dropped into the pool

S.FORM: ’ee pa nia ʉh meranasʉ tamtitu ia tia asa matisa’ʉ ʉh anu ia.
S.TRANSL: 那隻小狗還在那邊掙扎，想要抓那個蜂窩。
That dog was still struggling and wanted to grasp the beehive.

S.FORM: ma’icʉpʉ ’una anu misee.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在地上睡覺，小孩可能怕蜜蜂吧。
The kid slept on the floor. It appeared that he felt fear about bees.

S.FORM: ’ei niarapapining na canumu takarura isa.
S.TRANSL: 那個青蛙出現在水上。
That frog emerged from the water.

S.FORM: arakicacʉ manu ia 'ʉkʉrʉn kee ivicin makasi na.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩嚇了一跳，他摀著他的嘴巴。
The kid was surprised, and he put his hands to his mouse.

S.FORM: capai kee arakicacʉ tu aio ‘una ava anu nesi.
S.TRANSL: He was surprised that so there are bees here!
他嚇了一跳，原來這裡有蜜蜂啊！

S.FORM: ’an ma’icʉpʉ tamtituin mon ’inia mon a cu nia pokari a ’una ava tungingi ’una tungingi isi ’a cʉnra na tacau i.
S.TRANSL: 他的小狗不怕，待在那裡，就待在那裡了，（他）大叫這裡原來有老鼠，這個狗看到了。
His dog did not feel affraid and stayed there. Just stayed there. He shouted out that there was a mouse so! The dog saw it.

S.FORM: makai cu ne moca manu ia mosa na karu maringuna.
S.TRANSL: 好像是那個小孩往這裡走，又走去枯樹那裡。
It appealed that the child came here and went over the withered tree.

S.FORM: cʉmʉ’ʉra na tarako isa ’esi kara nia nguain tamna takarura.
S.TRANSL: 去看那個樹洞他養的那隻青蛙有沒有在裡面。
He went to see that hole whether his frog was inside there or not.

S.FORM: ’akia.
S.TRANSL: 沒有。
There was not.

S.FORM: ’akia takarura mon cu nesi manu isi pokari takarura ’esi kasu nanu mihee.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙不在，小孩一直在那個地方一直叫他養的青蛙到底去哪裡?
The frog was not there. The kid kept saying ‘where did my frog go?’

S.FORM: ei! arakicacʉ manu isi ararakau puka.
S.TRANSL: 那個貓頭鷹出來了，小朋友嚇了一跳。
The kid was shocked by the coming out of the owl.

S.FORM: ararakau sua puka isi na tarako niaranai na tarako arapapining.
S.TRANSL: 那個貓頭鷹出來，那個小朋友嚇了一跳就跌下來，狗也驚怕到就跑走了。
The owl came out from the hole. It came from the hole to the outside.

S.FORM: matapari’i sua manu isi na ’ʉnʉ’ʉnai careen cu.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩從那個樹跌下來 很可憐。
The child fell down to the earth. It is pitiful of him.

S.FORM: manguru nguain tamna tamtitu.
S.TRANSL: 他的小狗逃走了。
His doggy ran away.

S.FORM: ka’anʉva ka vutun.
S.TRANSL: 原來不是，是鹿。
But, it’s not a tree. It’s a deer.

S.FORM: ’an tavarʉ’ʉ makahi nen ninpara na vatu ’esi vutun nehi.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道那個鹿還在那裡。
He doesn’t know that the deer was still there.

S.FORM: cʉpʉng in ia karu nimacacaa mon na ’inia.
S.TRANSL: 他認為說旁邊那顆是樹，他在石頭上。
He thought that was a tree, and he stood above the stone.

S.FORM: makahi nesi ’esi pa ninpara na vatu manu isi ka’an tavarʉ’ʉ vutunuava mihee.
S.TRANSL: 事情來到這個時候 他還在爬到石頭上 他不知道原來是鹿。
When it came to this moment, the boy was still standing above the stone, he didn’t know that was a deer.

S.FORM: makahua cu makasi cu sian pokari na tacau isi.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣，到這裡。他一直叫他的狗。
Then, the kid kept calling his dog.

S.FORM: ’e pokariin kee manu isa ninpara na vutun.
S.TRANSL: 狗在叫那小孩子爬到鹿的上面。
The dog was barking at that dog for his mounting the deer.

S.FORM: tavarʉ’ʉ cu manu isa tu isieva ia vutun.
S.TRANSL: 小孩知道了 這個原來是鹿。
The kid understood this was a deer!

S.FORM: makasua cu ma’icʉpʉ sua manu isi mata tamtitu pokariin kee.
S.TRANSL: 這個時候，狗跟那個小朋友一直在害怕,然後他們就一直叫。
Then, both of the kid and the doggy were really afraid. They were crying .

S.FORM: nimatapari’i na canumu makasi cu canum.
S.TRANSL: 掉到水中，就這樣子在水中。
(They) therefore fell into the water.

S.FORM: sua tamtitu ia mopara na manu tamna navungu ma’icʉpʉ.
S.TRANSL: 後來小狗因為怕，爬到小朋友頭上。
The dog climbed to the boy and very scared.

S.FORM: mai’icʉpʉ si nimusikarʉ na canum.
S.TRANSL: 狗因為掉進水裡面，所以就怕。
The dog was scared due to falling into the water.

S.FORM: makasua cu sua manu isi moon na nesi pokari ‘takarura ’esi kasu nanu’.
S.TRANSL: 這個時候，小主人就一直叫：「我的青蛙我的青蛙你在哪裡？」
At the time, the boy kept calling the frog, saying ‘frog, where are you?’

S.FORM: ’una karu maringuna isi ’una tarako tesikar en.
S.TRANSL: 有一個乾的樹，樹裡有一個洞。
There was a dried tree, inside which there was a hole.

S.FORM: mon nesi tamtitu in mosikarʉ na vatu karu tarako isi mata manu ihi tu.
S.TRANSL: 他自己跟他的小狗在這裡，叫小狗進到樹洞裡。
He and his dog entered the tree hole.

S.FORM: takarura takarura ’esi kasu nan ‘mehen ’akia’.
S.TRANSL: 兩個一直同時說：「青蛙青蛙你在哪裡?」
Both they said, ‘Frog, frog where are you?’

S.FORM: ’an pa arapapining arapapining arakicacʉ.
S.TRANSL: 這青蛙一直沒有出來。牠一出來的時候他們嚇了一跳。
The frog didn’t come out for some time. They were shocked when the frog suddenly appeared.

S.FORM: manu isa mata tamtituava ’esi takarura mecocua.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和小狗看見青蛙原來兩隻在一起。
The kid and the doggy found that the frog had been walking with another frog!

S.FORM: isiava nimta takarura ihi tekirim karʉ en.
S.TRANSL: 原來他失蹤了這個青蛙找到他的愛人。
It was because that his lost frog had found his frog lover.

S.FORM: tekirim karʉ en takarura kangvang.
S.TRANSL: 他找的愛人也是青蛙。
The lover it found was also a frog.

S.FORM: ’an cu tia moha na tanasa makahia manu mata tamtitu.
S.TRANSL: 小主人跟小狗這樣想：「這個青蛙不想回家。」
‘The frog would not like to go home,’ the kid and the doggy thought.
